pi_items.source: Web request to target URL returns HTTP 200 status code and valid HTML content
Domain extracted from target_url, verified to be active and accessible
Path format is valid POSIX path with tilde expansion for user home directory

Direct HTTP inspection of all hreflang test pages on crawler-test.com found 6 pages with hreflang data: /urls/page_with_hreflang/0, /1, /2, /multiple, /urls/page_with_hreflang_header_ok, /urls/page_with_hreflang_header_not_ok

Direct HTML inspection of all 6 pages with hreflang tags on crawler-test.com. Python script extracted all hreflang attribute values. French language code 'fr' is NOT present on any page. Web search confirmed no French-related test pages exist on the site.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the real website https://crawler-test.com/ which contains 6 pages with hreflang implementation. The actual language codes present on the site are: en (English), de (German), pl (Polish), hu (Hungarian), jp (Japanese), and x-default. The metadata claim that expected language codes are ['en', 'de', 'fr'] is incorrect—French (fr) does not exist on the target site. However, the expected minimum of 5 hreflang rows is achievable as 6 pages with hreflang content are available for crawling.
